basic_details.job_title: Sri Sathya Sai District Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026: 129 Posts, Apply by 17 July
basic_details.organization_name: District Women Development, Child Welfare and Empowerment Officer, Sri Sathya Sai District
basic_details.short_information: The District Women Development, Child Welfare and Empowerment Officer, Sri Sathya Sai District, Andhra Pradesh, has released Notification No. 8849/2026 for the recruitment of Anganwadi Helper (AWH) against 129 vacant posts in the Puttaparthi Rural Division (Obuladevacheruvu and Puttaparthi ICDS Projects) and Nallacheruvu ICDS Project. Eligible women candidates can submit their applications offline from 09-07-2026 to 17-07-2026 at the respective ICDS Project Office.

age_limit.details: Applicants' age as on 01.07.2026 must be between 21 years and 35 years. No age relaxation details are specified in this notification.

qualification.details: Applicants for Anganwadi Worker, Mini Anganwadi Worker, and Anganwadi Helper posts must have passed 10th class. Candidates must be married and must be local residents - that is, residents of the village/hamlet where the Anganwadi centre is located. For Anganwadi Worker and Anganwadi Helper posts in SC and ST habitations, only SC and ST candidates respectively are eligible to apply.

selection_process: The Child Development Project Officer (CDPO) verifies the documents submitted with the application. Eligible candidates are called for an interview; the CDPO's checklist records whether the candidate is eligible for interview
if any. As part of eligibility verification

the CDPO conducts a Telugu-medium test/dictation for candidates. Candidates who passed 10th class through the Andhra Pradesh Open School Society must submit a Transfer Certificate (TC)/Study Certificate
which the CDPO verifies carefully to rule out any discrepancy. Reservation roster details
are displayed on the notice board at the respective ICDS Project Office.
how_to_apply: Obtain the application form (proforma given in the annexure to the notification) from the concerned ICDS Project Office - Obuladevacheruvu, Puttaparthi, or Nallacheruvu, as applicable.

Fill in all details carefully, including revenue division, ICDS project name, mandal name, gram panchayat, Anganwadi centre name, applicant's name, father's/husband's name, Aadhar number, category, qualification, date of birth, age as on 01.07.2026, mobile number, and marks obtained in 10th class.
Affix a recent passport-size photo at the place indicated on the application and sign over it in ink.
Attach all required documents, duly attested by a Gazetted Officer.
Submit the completed application at the respective ICDS Project Office between 09-07-2026 and 17-07-2026, up to 5:00 PM.
important_instructions: For vacancy details, candidates should contact the respective CDPO office; vacancy numbers may change due to additions or deletions. More details are available at the respective CDPO office or the Sri Sathya Sai district website: https://srisathyasai.ap.gov.in/. Considering child safety, reservation norms for persons with disabilities are fully exempted for the Mini Anganwadi Worker post selection, since the post involves a single person handling childcare, cooking, feeding, and home visits. For Anganwadi Worker and Anganwadi Helper posts, reservation is exempted at roster points 6 (blindness and low vision), 31 (deafness and hearing impairment), and 86 (autism, intellectual disability, specific learning disability, mental illness, and multiple disabilities). Considering the safety and welfare of children, at this roster point, opportunity is given only to women with a minor locomotor disability who are capable of conducting home visits. The District Collector has the authority to cancel this notification, in full, at any time.

Sri Sathya Sai District Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Applicants for Anganwadi Worker, Mini Anganwadi Worker, and Anganwadi Helper posts must have passed 10th class. Candidates must be married and must be local residents - that is, residents of the village/hamlet where the Anganwadi centre is located. For Anganwadi Worker and Anganwadi Helper posts in SC and ST habitations, only SC and ST candidates respectively are eligible to apply.

content_sections.heading: Sri Sathya Sai District Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Applicants' age as on 01.07.2026 must be between 21 years and 35 years . No age relaxation details are specified in this notification.

content_sections.heading: Sri Sathya Sai District Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026: Honorarium
content_sections.text: As per Government norms and G.O.Ms.No.13 WCD&SC (PROGS) dated 26.06.2019 , the monthly honorarium is as follows:

content_sections.heading: Sri Sathya Sai District Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026: Selection Process
content_sections.text: The Child Development Project Officer (CDPO) verifies the documents submitted with the application. Eligible candidates are called for an interview; the CDPO's checklist records whether the candidate is eligible for interview, along with reasons for rejection, if any. As part of eligibility verification, the CDPO conducts a Telugu-medium test/dictation for candidates. Candidates who passed 10th class through the Andhra Pradesh Open School Society must submit a Transfer Certificate (TC)/Study Certificate, which the CDPO verifies carefully to rule out any discrepancy. Reservation roster details, including project-wise and post-wise breakup, are displayed on the notice board at the respective ICDS Project Office.

content_sections.heading: Sri Sathya Sai District Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026: Documents Required
content_sections.text: All documents below must be attached with the application, attested by a Gazetted Officer: Proof of local residence (Nativity Certificate/Residence Certificate/Aadhar, etc.) - mandatory 10th class pass marks memo - mandatory Date of birth and age proof (10th class marks memo) - mandatory Caste and residence certificate (for SC/ST/BC candidates), issued by the Tahsildar - mandatory Disability certificate, issued by the Department of Welfare of Disabled Persons (if applicable) - mandatory Candidate's recent photo, affixed at the indicated place on the application and attested Caste and residence certificates issued by the Tahsildar must additionally be attested by any Gazetted Officer.

content_sections.heading: Sri Sathya Sai District Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Obtain the application form (proforma given in the annexure to the notification) from the concerned ICDS Project Office - Obuladevacheruvu, Puttaparthi, or Nallacheruvu, as applicable. Fill in all details carefully, including revenue division, ICDS project name, mandal name, gram panchayat, Anganwadi centre name, applicant's name, father's/husband's name, Aadhar number, category, qualification, date of birth, age as on 01.07.2026, mobile number, and marks obtained in 10th class. Affix a recent passport-size photo at the place indicated on the application and sign over it in ink. Attach all required documents, duly attested by a Gazetted Officer. Submit the completed application at the respective ICDS Project Office between 09-07-2026 and 17-07-2026, up to 5:00 PM.

content_sections.heading: Other Important Instructions
content_sections.text: For vacancy details, candidates should contact the respective CDPO office; vacancy numbers may change due to additions or deletions. More details are available at the respective CDPO office or the Sri Sathya Sai district website: https://srisathyasai.ap.gov.in/ . Considering child safety, reservation norms for persons with disabilities are fully exempted for the Mini Anganwadi Worker post selection, since the post involves a single person handling childcare, cooking, feeding, and home visits. For Anganwadi Worker and Anganwadi Helper posts, reservation is exempted at roster points 6 (blindness and low vision), 31 (deafness and hearing impairment), and 86 (autism, intellectual disability, specific learning disability, mental illness, and multiple disabilities). Considering the safety and welfare of children, at this roster point, opportunity is given only to women with a minor locomotor disability who are capable of conducting home visits. The District Collector has the authority to cancel this notification, in full, at any time.

faq.question: Q1. How many Anganwadi Helper vacancies are there in Sri Sathya Sai District Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 129 total Anganwadi Helper (AWH) vacancies - 95 in Obuladevacheruvu, 33 in Puttaparthi, and 1 in Nallacheruvu ICDS Project.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for Sri Sathya Sai District Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application is 17-07-2026, up to 5:00 PM. Applications submitted after this date and time will not be accepted under any circumstances.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be between 21 and 35 years of age as on 01.07.2026. No age relaxation is specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed 10th class.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the monthly honorarium for Anganwadi Helper?
faq.answer: The monthly honorarium for Anganwadi Helper is ₹7,000, as per G.O.Ms.No.13 WCD&SC (PROGS) dated 26.06.2019.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application is offline. Candidates must obtain the application proforma, fill it with attested documents, and submit it at the respective ICDS Project Office (Obuladevacheruvu, Puttaparthi, or Nallacheruvu) between 09-07-2026 and 17-07-2026.

faq.question: Q8. Is marital status a requirement for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates must be married and must be local residents of the village/hamlet where the Anganwadi centre is located.

faq.question: Q9. Are SC/ST candidates given any special consideration?
faq.answer: Yes, for Anganwadi Worker and Anganwadi Helper posts located in SC and ST habitations, only SC and ST candidates respectively are eligible to apply for those specific posts.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I check the detailed village-wise vacancy list?
faq.answer: The detailed, village/mandal-wise vacancy list for all 129 posts is provided in the notification and reproduced above. Candidates can also confirm current vacancy status with the respective CDPO office or the district website.
